baseSection.title: Implementation, integration, optimization
baseSection.baseDescription: Self-taught programmer passionate about cybersecurity, especially in web application security. Always ready to take on new challenges — the more difficult, the better.

experienceSection.title: Experience
experienceSection.subtitle: Career path — from full-stack to architecture and collaboration in product teams.

aboutSection.title: About me
aboutSection.description: I build web applications end to end — from development to deployment. I work with React and Next.js on the frontend, Node.js and databases on the backend, and focus on clean code, performance, and well-implemented user experience. I also have experience with WordPress and DevOps fundamentals, which allows me to understand and manage the full development-to-production workflow.

skillsSection.title: Skills
skillsSection.subtitle: Frontend and backend, databases, tools — selected technologies I use every day. I adapt the stack to each project and its requirements.
skillsSection.description: I create modern, responsive web applications with a strong focus on code readability, performance, and security. I'm proficient in both frontend and backend development, using well-established tools and technologies. I have experience working with Linux systems, application containerization (Docker), process automation, as well as SEO optimization and web application security analysis. I'm continuously developing my skills in programming and cybersecurity, allowing me to build robust, scalable, and secure solutions ready for production deployment.

skillsList.tailwindcss: CSS framework for creating responsive and aesthetic web applications.

skillsList.sql: Query language for managing relational databases.
skillsList.n8n: Platform for process automation and application integration.
skillsList.jenkins: Open-source CI/CD tool. Automates the build and deployment process.
skillsList.nginx: Web server for handling HTTP and reverse proxy requests.
skillsList.docker: Platform for containerization, which allows running applications in isolated, portable environments.
skillsList.gitlab: Git repository manager for version control and collaboration.
skillsList.metasploit: Advanced framework for testing security and performing penetration tests.
skillsList.github: Popular platform for version control and collaboration.
skillsList.mcp: I use and set up MCP servers in my daily work.

certsSection.title: Training & certifications
certsSection.subtitle: I complement courses and certificates with hands-on project work — from React and Node to security and databases. What matters most to me is connecting knowledge with real deployments.
certsSection.description: I am constantly expanding my knowledge as a web developer and security enthusiast. The selected courses and certifications below reflect my commitment to growth and security in the dynamic world of technology.

projectsSection.title: Projects
projectsSection.description: Click a card — it expands into a full-screen project view over a dimmed page: goal, assumptions, gallery, and summary.

contactSection.title: Contact
contactSection.intro: Have a question or want to discuss a project? Write to me — I will reply within 24 hours. I am happy to answer questions about collaboration, estimates, or technical details. You can use the form below or write directly by email or LinkedIn.
